Package pieces

package pieces
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Archer
    Represents an Archer piece in the Kuroshiro engine.
    ArcherTest
    Unit tests for the Archer piece.
    Archmage
    Represents an Archmage piece within the Kuroshiro engine.
    ArchmageTest
    Unit tests for the Archmage piece.
    Assassin
    Represents an Assassin piece within the Kuroshiro engine.
    AssassinTest
    Unit tests for the Assassin piece.
    Dragon
    Represents a highly powerful Dragon piece within the Kuroshiro engine.
    DragonTest
    Unit tests for the Dragon piece.
    Mage
    Represents a Mage piece within the Kuroshiro engine.
    MageTest
    Unit tests for the Mage piece.
    Warrior
    Represents a Warrior piece within the Kuroshiro engine.
    WarriorTest
    Unit tests for the Warrior piece.
